reviews.review_description: This game is absolutely splendid. The reason I think this game is so amazing is because it has a huge map to explore and just have fun in, also the toon aspect added to the hands makes the game look unique. The multiplayer is amazing for when you want to play a fun game with friends.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the positive review, the game is still in beta.
